# Story Template

## Status

- State: planned | in-progress | done | blocked
- Owner:
- Last updated:

## Goal

Describe the user or maintainer outcome.

## User Value

Explain why this story matters and who benefits.

## Scope

- In:
- Out:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Product Docs

Link affected product docs.

## Architecture Docs

Link affected architecture boundaries.

## Decisions

Link decisions that constrain the story or note `none`.

## Implementation Notes

Record important constraints, integration points, or sequencing notes.

## Validation

List the commands, manual checks, or provider/network proof needed.

## Evidence

Record proof after validation runs.
